acceptance_criteria: The receipt records FAIL because actual soundness used gold rather than the preregistered visible-test anchor.
The candidate-diff-derived source/function locator and gold soundness filter are disclosed.
The 10 registered paired-gold controls were not independently generated/evaluated and their specificity is unavailable.
The >=5 threshold is identified as a post-generation diagnostic, not a prospective bar.
Provider calls <=120 and spend <=$15.00; no undeleted cloud resources.
The exploratory 4/10 catch set, 0/2 equivalent-control flags, and missingness-aware overlap estimands regenerate from retained evidence.
Gold passing is described as an inclusion rule, not an independent false-positive estimate.
No gold-free, diff-free, deployable-ensemble, natural-frequency, leaderboard, model-superiority, or SOTA claim is made.

evidence.notes: The runner proves the retained prompt was supplied a source/function locator extracted from each candidate variant diff.

CI run 29358936718 succeeded with 24 retained gold/variant property executions. The historical shell used mutable :latest image tags and retained no resolved digest, so exact container-byte provenance is unavailable.

Exploratory diagnostic: 12/12 properties pass the gold filter, 4/10 hacks are caught, and 0/2 equivalent controls are flagged. Historical overlap is 8/10 observed, 9/10 missing upper, 7/8 judge-complete, and 8/9 property-resolved; django-11211 is judge-unadjudicated, not a confirmed judge miss.

falsifiers: The original iter197 gate is reported as passing or merely missing its recall bar rather than failing for protocol deviation.
The later-added >=5 diagnostic is presented as preregistered or prospective.
The property pipeline is described as fully gold-free, diff-free, or independently zero-FP.
Specificity is claimed for the 10 registered paired-gold controls, or django-11211 is called a confirmed judge miss.
A reported exploratory number does not regenerate from committed property text and execution logs.
The observed union is presented as confirmed complementarity or a stable/deployable ensemble advantage.
A leaderboard, model-superiority, SOTA, natural-frequency, broad-robustness, or production claim is made.
stated_goal: Correct the iter197 methodology record while preserving its exploratory locator-assisted, gold-validated property outcomes.
